title: Kingsburg Truck Sales Bolsters Workhorse Partnership California
text: Kingsburg Truck Sales bolstered its partnership with Workhorse as the company sharpened its commercial EV focus. Kingsburg Truck Center, based in Kingsburg, California, is Workhorse's first certified electric vehicle dealer in California. Kingsburg earned recognition as Workhorse's 2023 dealer of the year and committed to purchase 141 units of Workhorse W4 CC Class 4 battery-electric cab chassis trucks expected to be delivered in 2024. Kingsburg Truck Center is one of the nation's leading commercial truck dealerships specializing in advanced vocational solutions and zero-emission fleet deployment, providing comprehensive upfitting, sales, and service. Recently, Kingsburg and Workhorse announced a purchase order for 100 W56 fully-electric step vans from Gateway Fleets, a California-based provider of bundled electric vehicle and charging solutions for commercial delivery operators.
